---
title: "Georreferencing"
author: "MPPJ"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}

packages <- c("tidyverse", "readxl", "readr", "data.table", "dplyr", "stringr", "ggplot2", "sf", "fs", "rnaturalearth", "rnaturalearthdata", "rio", "countrycode","maps", "stringi","rnaturalearthdata","devtools", "pack", "cli", "remotes", "countrycode","progress", "tidygeocoder", "dplyr", "readr", "purrr")

# Install packages not yet installed [for the first time]
installed_packages <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())
if (any(installed_packages == FALSE)) {
 install.packages(packages[!installed_packages])
}

# Packages loading
invisible(lapply(packages, require, character.only = TRUE)) # remove "invisible" to see whether the packages are loaded/available. 

Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "Spanish_Spain.1252") # en Windows


```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}

dfCR <- read.csv2("./data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__CR2024.csv",sep = ",")

names(df) # check names of the columns
View(df) # if you want to open and see the file
str(dfCR) #solo
head(dfCR) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)



```

```{r}
dfAmaz <- df %>%
  filter(.ok_for_analysis == FALSE,
         !is.na(decimalLatitude),
         !is.na(decimalLongitude)) %>%
  select(
    occurrenceID,
    decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude,
    locality, country, countryCode,
    changes
  )

View(dfAmaz)


dfCR1 <- dfCR %>%
  filter(.ok_for_analysis == FALSE,
         !is.na(decimalLatitude),
         !is.na(decimalLongitude)) %>%
  select(
    occurrenceID,
    decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude,
    locality, country, countryCode,
    changes
  )

View(dfCR1)


dfcrd <- dfCR %>%
  mutate(
    georef_class = case_when(
      is.na(locality) | str_squish(locality) == "" ~ "non_georef",
      str_detect(locality, regex(
        "\\d+\\s*km|carretera|road|highway|reserva|parque nacional|rÃ­o|quebrada|cerro|vereda",
        ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "detailed",
      TRUE ~ "simple"
    )
  )

view(dfcrd)
```



```{r}
plot(dfAmaz$decimalLongitude, dfAmaz$decimalLatitude,
     xlab = "Longitude", ylab = "Latitude",
     main = "Decimal Coordinates",
     pch = 19, col = "blue")


# Get world map data
world <- map_data("world")

# Filter for selected countries
countries <- c("Peru", "Brazil", "Ecuador", "Colombia")
region_map <- subset(world, region %in% countries)

# Plot
ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = region_map,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = region),
               color = "black", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = df, aes(x = decimalLongitude, y = decimalLatitude),
             color = "red", size = 3) +
  coord_fixed(1.3, xlim = c(-82, -45), ylim = c(-20, 10)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Peru" = "lightblue",
                               "Brazil" = "lightgreen",
                               "Ecuador" = "orange",
                               "Colombia" = "pink")) +
  labs(title = "Selected Countries with Coordinates",
       x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude", fill = "Country")


```



```{r}


if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfAmaz)) dfAmaz$ok.2 <- dfAmaz$.ok_for_analysis
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfAmaz)) dfAmaz$discardReason <- NA_character_
view(dfAmaz)


# flag AMAZ_47 for discard
idx <- which(dfAmaz$occurrenceID == "AMAZ_8")
if (length(idx)) {
  dfAmaz$discardReason[idx] <- "Impossible to correct, too vague coordinate"
}







if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfAmaz)) dfAmaz$ok.2 <- dfAmaz$.ok_for_analysis
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfAmaz)) dfAmaz$discardReason <- NA_character_

# flag AMAZ_47 for discard
idx <- which(dfAmaz$occurrenceID == "AMAZ_41")
if (length(idx)) {
    dfAmaz$decimalLatitude[idx] <- -11.082302793805184
    dfAmaz$decimalLongitude[idx] <- -76.15208375774569
  dfAmaz$discardReason[idx] <- "Corrected: point was corrected according to the reference of the locality."
}


```



##Para guardar el archivo

```{r}
write.csv(dfAmaz, file = "output/Georreferencing/AMAZ2024.csv")
```








```{r}

voluntarios <- read.csv2("E:/CONTINENT/Volunteership/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/georeferencing_audit_summary.csv", sep = ",")

voluntarios$voluntarios <- NA_character_
str(voluntarios)
View(voluntarios)

idx <- which(voluntarios$dataset == "AMAZ2024")
if (length(idx)) {
    voluntarios$voluntarios[idx] <- "Simon"
}



idx <- which(voluntarios$dataset == "assis_i_2026_af")
if (length(idx)) {
    voluntarios$voluntarios[idx] <- "Luis"
}



























write.csv(voluntarios, file = "data/Georreferencing/georeferencing_audit_summary.csv")

```
